full_text:
Chen Duan (Zizheng) 陳端 (子正)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Duan (陳端), styledZizheng (子正), was born in Guangling. Advisor to Sun Ce, along with fellow countrymen Zhang Hong and Qin Song. Chen Duan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Chen Duan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
